tree.name: Jaden McDaniels
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team draft night trade: MIN acquired Ricky Rubio and Jaden McDaniels (#28) from OKC, and Leandro Bolmaro (#23) from NYK. MIN sent James Johnson, Aleksej Pokuševski (#17), and 2024 2nd round pick to OKC, and Mathias Lessort + DET 2023 2nd round pick to NYK.

assetsGivenUp.name: James Johnson
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: MIN sent Gorgui Dieng to MEM. MIA sent James Johnson to MIN. MEM sent Jae Crowder, Solomon Hill, Andre Iguodala to MIA and received Dion Waiters, Justise Winslow.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from MIA in 3-team trade. Sent to OKC.

assetsGivenUp.name: Gorgui Dieng
assetsGivenUp.note: Senegalese center from Louisville, 2013 #21 overall pick. Sent to MEM.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2020 1st Round Pick (#17)
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired from ATL in Feb 5, 2020 4-team trade (Covington/Beasley deal). Used to select Pokuševski for OKC.

assetsGivenUp.name: Robert Covington
assetsGivenUp.note: Part of 4-team trade cost (shared with Beasley/Vanderbilt). Full chain detailed in min-rudy-gobert.json Beasley branch.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jimmy Butler
assetsGivenUp.note: Full chain: LaVine (draft #13) + Dunn (draft #5) + 2017 #7 pick (Markkanen). See min-rudy-gobert.json.

assetsGivenUp.name: Keita Bates-Diop
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared 4-team trade cost. Sent to DEN.

assetsGivenUp.name: Shabazz Napier
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared 4-team trade cost. Sent to DEN.

assetsGivenUp.name: Noah Vonleh
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared 4-team trade cost. Sent to DEN.

assetsGivenUp.name: Jordan Bell
assetsGivenUp.note: Shared 4-team trade cost. Sent to HOU.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#32)
assetsGivenUp.note: MIN 2024 2nd round pick, sent to OKC
